title: Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions:
Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions!
